sqls.name: Department_Member
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Department_Member AS SELECT DName, FacID FROM Member_of JOIN Department ON Member_of.DNO = Department.DNO;

sqls.name: Employee_Courses
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Employee_Courses AS SELECT Faculty.FacID, Course.CID, Course.Instructor, Department.DName FROM Faculty JOIN Member_of ON Faculty.FacID = Member_of.FacID JOIN Course ON Faculty.FacID = Course.Instructor JOIN Department ON Member_of.DNO = Department.DNO;

sqls.name: Employee_Details
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW Employee_Details AS SELECT Faculty.FacID, Faculty.Lname, Faculty.Rank, Member_of.Appt_Type FROM Faculty JOIN Member_of ON Faculty.FacID = Member_of.FacID;
